positive: An intricate, celestial-themed mandal abstract design. The composition features a central, stylized nebula swirl composed of deep indigo, electric sapphire, and vibrant violet tones, radiating outward into symmetrical, interconnected geometric patterns. Interspersed within the patterns are silhouetted elements of mythical constellations, such as stylized winged beasts and glowing lunar cycles. The overall aesthetic is neo-tribal mixed with cosmic art, utilizing dot-work and clean, sharp lines for maximum print visibility. The style should resemble detailed woodblock print mixed with digital bioluminescence. Composition must be perfectly centered and highly contrasted against a deep, midnight-black background, ensuring the print reads well on fabric. Cinematic, high detail, graphic design, vector art quality.
negative: blurry, amateur, low detail, text, watermark, logo, copyright, celebrity, signature, extra limbs, bad anatomy, noisy, grainy, gradient wash, smoke, photorealistic, 3d render
